forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 30. West wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 13. Southwest wind around 6 mph.

weather_report:
In Boston this afternoon, the air is fresh and vibrant, revealing a canvas of blue punctuated by the gentle dance of cottony clouds. Temperatures hover comfortably, inviting exploration as the warmth begins to envelop the city. The west wind carries with it whispers of spring's approach, as if nature is gently nudging us towards brighter days. As evening approaches, the sky remains mostly clear, letting the fading light cast a serene glow on the crisp surroundings. Although the night promises to dip into chillier realms, it will still offer a peaceful tranquility under a star-speckled sky.

In this splendid winter afternoon, a light jacket should serve you well, accompanied perhaps by a cozy scarf to fend off the evening's cool embrace. A stroll along the Charles River or a visit to one of the local cafes could be delightful ways to savor these pleasant conditions, allowing time to breathe deeply and appreciate the serenity that accompanies a winter day in Boston. Embrace the simplicity of the moment, perhaps even indulging in a warm drink while you watch the world wind down, savoring the remnants of daylight.
